summary: iter304 verified end-to-end against preview URL. All 48 tests PASS: bug303_tenant_admin_permissions (9), bug303_extra_scenarios (11 — updated 2 stale tests due to iter304's tightened policy), bug304_tenant_admin_sync (2), bug304_sync_extras (7 new: super_admin create/update tenant → admin user sync + self-edit forbidden fields), plus regression: bug302_zk_sync_attendance (4), biometric_auto_sync (9), biometric_zk_all_models (5), biometric_iter295_extras (3), notify_multichannel_iter299 (2). Policy enforced correctly: tenant admin can self-edit phone/email/name/password but NOT role/permissions/branch_id/is_active; cannot create/promote/delete admin; cannot delete self (400). Bidirectional sync verified: user PUT phone/full_name → tenants.owner_phone/owner_name; super_admin POST/PUT tenant with owner_phone → admin user.phone.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py update_user (4054-4134): policy correctly enforced — forbidden_self_fields set works, but note tenant_id is silently ignored by pydantic (not in UserUpdate model); safe defense-in-depth but consider explicit 403 for extra fields.
server.py delete_user (4156): defensive dual-check current_user.get('id')/get('user_id') is good; keep.
super_admin_routes.py create_tenant (196-211): admin_doc.phone = tenant.owner_phone correctly propagated; update_tenant (852-863) syncs email/full_name/phone. Both verified.
server.py is at 17443 lines — split still recommended (pre-existing tech-debt).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bug303_extra_scenarios.py (minor: test_H message assertion loosened; test_J uses DB-seed for co-admin since admin can no longer create admin per iter304 policy)
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com/admin123 (tenant admin); owner@maestroegp.com/owner123 + secret_key=271018 (super_admin). Both work directly (no 2FA challenge on preview).
seed_data_creation: Temp users bug303v2-*, bug304-*, bug303x-* and tenants bug304* — all cleaned up in teardown fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter304 fully verified. Two-way sync (user↔tenant) works both directions. Any future changes to UserUpdate model that add tenant_id/is_active/permissions should still be caught by forbidden_self_fields guard in server.py:4092. bug303_extra_scenarios test_H/test_J were updated to accommodate the tightened policy where tenant admin cannot create another admin (co-admin now seeded via DB).
